title: Evidence Docket 6.1 — Agent Level-Up Lab
objective: Demonstrate how a validated lesson from one agent becomes bounded Chronicle memory for all agents.

claims_matrix.claim: A single agent can propose a reusable lesson.
claims_matrix.evidence: interactive demo state and learning-event artifact

claims_matrix.claim: All agents can use the lesson only after validation.
Unvalidated lessons cannot influence future missions.
claims_matrix.evidence: missing replay and rejected verdict simulations

public_private_boundary: Public page shows proof state and public-safe artifacts only; private traces and sensitive context remain out of public pages.
claim_boundary: Public-alpha interface. Strong claims require real proof runs, baselines, replay logs, validator reports, delayed outcomes, and independent review.
